squares.heading: Our Mission
squares.text: To eliminate busywork so teams can focus on what actually matters.

squares.heading: Founded 2024
squares.text: Started in a garage in Austin, TX by three ex-engineers from big tech.

squares.heading: The Team
squares.text: 32 people across 12 countries, all working remotely using Toolio itself.

squares.heading: Open Source
squares.text: Our core engine is open source. We believe in building in public.

squares.heading: Backed By
squares.text: Seed funded by Sequoia and Y Combinator. Series A coming soon.

squares.heading: Contact
squares.text: hello@toolio.dev — we read every email and reply within 24 hours.
